title: Deduplicate top header and add subtitle under Campus Cafeteria

requirements.text: Ensure the app renders exactly one top header across the user flow by removing the duplicate Header rendering so only a single sticky header appears at the top (the header must not be duplicated on the Home page).

quotes:
Keep ONLY ONE header at the top.
Remove any duplicate "Campus Cafeteria" header.
Do not duplicate the header component

acceptanceCriteria: When viewing the non-admin user experience, only one header bar is visible at the top (no duplicate 'Campus Cafeteria' headers).
No other parts of the page layout are changed beyond removing the duplicate header instance.

requirements.text: Update the Header title block so that directly below the main title "Campus Cafeteria" there is a smaller subtitle line with the exact text "JSPM Canteen" styled in light gray, with clean vertical spacing between title and subtitle; the subtitle must be visually smaller than the main title.

quotes:
Below "Campus Cafeteria", add a smaller subtitle text:
   "JSPM Canteen"

Design requirements:
- Subtitle should be smaller than the main title
- Light gray color
- Clean spacing between title and subtitle

acceptanceCriteria: The header shows 'Campus Cafeteria' as the main title and 'JSPM Canteen' immediately beneath it.
The subtitle is smaller than the title and uses a light gray color.
Spacing between the title and subtitle is clean and visually consistent (no crowding or excessive gap).

requirements.text: Keep the authentication button (Login/Logout) aligned to the right within the single header, and ensure existing cart/login interactions still work after removing the duplicate header (including proceeding to payment from the cart drawer).

quotes: Keep the Login button aligned to the right
Do not change anything else in the layout.

acceptanceCriteria: The Login/Logout button remains right-aligned in the header (same row as before).
Proceed-to-payment from the cart drawer still navigates the user to the payment flow as it did before the header de-duplication.
No additional layout changes are introduced outside of the header de-duplication and subtitle update.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only components must be composed, not modified).
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx (immutable paths).
Do not change anything else in the layout besides: (1) removing the duplicate header instance and (2) updating the header subtitle as specified.
nonGoals: Changing the main title text "Campus Cafeteria".
Redesigning the page layout, footer, tabs, or other sections.
Adding new pages or new authentication providers.
